hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(sync_(to|from)_hpc|submit_(training|evaluation|training_multigpu)|run_interactive|continue_training)\.sh|(rsync|scp|ssh)[[:space:]][^&|;]*fk67rahe'; then echo 'Blocked by .claude/settings.json: HPC operations (sync/submit/ssh) are user-managed per CLAUDE.md Forbidden Actions. Claude may Edit/Read these scripts but must never execute them.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
